Title: Annual Inspection
Notes: FAR 91.409 annual. Required for all aircraft used in Part 91 operations.

Title: 100hr Inspection
Notes: 100-hour inspection required when aircraft is operated for hire (FAR 91.409(b)).

Title: Pitot-Static Check
Notes: IFR pitot-static system and altimeter check.
Compliance Details: Altimeter, VSI, and ASI must be within tolerance per FAR 91.411.

Title: Transponder Certification
Notes: Mode A, C, and S transponder check.

Title: AD 2019-20-10 — Slick Magneto
Notes: Replace pre-2019 Slick 4376 magneto with overhauled or new unit.
Compliance Details: Inspect magneto for cracked distributor block. If cracked, replace with overhauled or new unit before next flight.

Title: SB 2024-03 — Door Seal Service
Notes: Inspect door seals for deterioration per SB 2024-03.
